nodes.label: ``hermes debug`` debug tools for Hermes Agent.  Currently supports:     herme
Record *urls* for deletion at ``now + delay_seconds``.      Only paste.rs URLs
Synchronously DELETE any pending pastes whose ``expire_at`` has passed.      R
Attempt pending-paste cleanup without letting /debug fail offline.
Extract the paste ID from a paste.rs or dpaste.com URL.      Returns the ID st
Delete a paste from paste.rs.  Returns True on success.      Only paste.rs sup
Record *urls* for deletion ``delay_seconds`` from now.      Previously this sp
Return a one-liner delete command for the given paste URL.
Upload to paste.rs.  Returns the paste URL.      paste.rs accepts a plain POST
Upload to dpaste.com.  Returns the paste URL.      dpaste.com uses multipart f
Upload *content* to a paste service, trying paste.rs then dpaste.com.      Ret
Single-read snapshot of a log file used by debug-share.
Where *log_name* would live if present. Doesn't check existence.
Find the log file for *log_name*, falling back to the .1 rotation.      Return
Capture a log once and derive summary/full-log views from it.      The report
Capture all logs used by debug-share exactly once.      ``redact`` is forwarde
Run ``hermes dump`` and return its stdout as a string.
Build the summary debug report: system dump + log tails.      Parameters
Collect debug report + full logs, upload each, print URLs.
Delete one or more paste URLs uploaded by /debug.
